---
title: "Examining the Effects of Precipitation on Vehicle Crashes in Connecticut"
format:
 revealjs:
  self-contained: false
  embed-resources: true
  resources:
  - images/roads.html
  slideNumber: true
  theme: simple
  include-in-header:
   text: |
    <style>
    .v-center-container {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: center;
      height: 90%;
    }
    .container {
      display: flex;
      gap: 20px;
      align-items: flex-start;
    }
    .col {
      flex: 1;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .col img {
      height: 300px;
      width: auto;
      display: block;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }
    .image-box {
      background-color: rgba(240, 240, 240, 0.7);
      padding: 20px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      display: inline-block;
      margin: 0 auto;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    }
    .image-box2 {
      background-color: rgba(38, 38, 38, 0.7);
      padding: 20px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      display: inline-block;
      margin: 0 auto;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    }
    .image-box3 {
      background-color: rgba(250, 250, 250, 0.7);
      padding: 20px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      display: inline-block;
      margin: 0 auto;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    }
    body {
      font-family: sans-serif;
      padding: 2rem;
      background: #fff;
      color: #111;
    }
    .table-title {
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #666;
      margin: 0 0 0.75rem 0;
    }
    .severity-legend {
      display: flex;
      gap: 16px;
      margin: 0 0 1.25rem 0;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .legend-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: #555;
    }
    .dot {
      width: 8px;
      height: 8px;
      border-radius: 50%;
    }
    table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      font-size: 15px;
    }
    thead tr {
      border-bottom: 1.5px solid #ccc;
    }
    th {
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 13px;
      color: #555;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      text-align: right;
    }
    th.label-col {
      text-align: left;
    }
    tbody tr {
      border-bottom: 0.5px solid #e5e5e5;
    }
    tbody tr:last-child {
      border-bottom: none;
    }
    td {
      padding: 10px 16px;
      text-align: right;
      font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
    }
    td.label-col {
      text-align: left;
      font-weight: 500;
    }
    .badge {
      display: inline-block;
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      margin-left: 4px;
    }
    .badge-k { background: #FCEBEB; color: #421B53; }
    .badge-a { background: #FAEEDA; color: #8D2519; }
    .badge-b { background: #EAF3DE; color: #A85D1C; }
    .badge-c { background: #E6F1FB; color: #E7C031; }
    </style>
highlight-style: "github"
footer: "Jack Bienvenue | STAT5095"
preview-links: false
---

<!--SLIDE 2 ------------------------------------------------------>
<section data-auto-animate data-background="images/ct_storm_animation_cropped_compressed.gif" data-background-size="1400px">
</section>

<!--SLIDE 3 ------------------------------------------------------>

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h2 style="text-align: center;">Problem Introduction</h2>
  
<div class="container">

<div class="col">
  <p>Motor Vehicle Crashes</p>
  <ul>
    <li>Global leading cause of death among 5-29 year olds   [1, WHO]</li>
    <li>Cost CT ~$5 billion annually [2, USDOT]</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="col">
  <p>Precipitation & Driving</p>
  <li style="text-align: left;">Poor weather conditions reduce visibility & decrease traction,</li>
  <li style="text-align: left;">Creating hazardous roadway conditions</li>
</div>
</div>

<div class="image-box3">
<img src="images/snowy_crash.gif" style="display: block; margin: 0 auto; width: 150%;">
</div>

<h2 style="text-align: right; position: absolute; bottom: 100px; right: 25px; text-align: right;">Data Overview</h2>
</section>


<!--SLIDES - Data Overview -------------------------------------------->

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h2 style="text-align: center;">Data Overview</h2>
  <p style="text-align: center;">ERA5 Land Package [3, ECMWF]</p>
  

  <div class="image-box3" style="width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box;">
  <iframe src="./images/grid_cells.html" width="100%" height="440px" style="border: none; display: block;"></iframe>
</div>

</section>

<section data-auto-animate>
<h2 style="text-align: center;">Data Overview</h2>
<p style="text-align: center;">CT Roads [4, CT DEEP]</p>

<div class="container">

<div class="col">
<div class="image-box3" style="width: 65%; box-sizing: border-box;">
<img src="images/Mansfield_roads.png" style="height: 420px; width: 75%; display: block;">
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h2 style="text-align: center;">Data Overview</h2>

  <p style="text-align: center;">CT Crashes [5, UConn CTCDR]</p>

<div class="container">
<div class="col">
<div class="image-box3" style="width: 65%; box-sizing: border-box;">
<img src="images/fig4b_geomean.png" style="height: 420px; width: 75%; display: block;">
</div>
</div>
</div>

<p style="text-align: center;"> [4, CT DEEP; 6, US Census Bureau]</p>

</section>

<!-- ------------------------------------------------------>

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h1 style="text-align: center;">Duration-Based Method for</h1>
  <h1 style="text-align: center;">Accident Frequency Under</h1>
  <h1 style="text-align: center;">Wet and Dry Conditions</h1>
</section>

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h2 style="text-align: center;"> Durational Approach </h2>
  <p>Benefits:</p> 
  <ul>
    <li>Immediately provides sense of mean of time between events under properly specified distributional assumptions</li>
  </ul>
  <p>Drawbacks: </p>
  <ul>
    <li>Requires sufficiently great extent of aggregation, making it harder to estimate recurrence at smaller scales</li>
  </ul>
</section>

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h2 style="text-align: center;"> Durational Approach: Distributions </h2>

<div class="image-box3" style="width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0 auto;">
<img src="./images/overlaid_hists_duration1.png" style="display: block; margin: 20px auto; width: 80%;">
</div>

</section>

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h2 style="text-align: center;"> Durational Approach: Distributions Cont. </h2>

<div class="image-box3" style="width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box;">
<img src="./images/Gamma_fit.png" style="display: block; margin: 0 auto; width: 80%;">
</div>
</section>

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h2 style="text-align: center;"> Durational Approach: Hypothesis Testing </h2>

<div class="container">

<div class="col">
  <p>Parametric - Gamma($\alpha$, $\theta$)</p>
  <ul>
    <li>$\alpha \sim$ shape, $\theta \sim$ scale; $\rightarrow E[X] = \alpha\theta$ </li>
    <li>Likelihood ratio test:</li>
    <li>$H_0: \theta_{\text{dry}} = \theta_{\text{wet}}$</li>
    <li>$H_A: \theta_{\text{dry}} \neq \theta_{\text{wet}}$</li>
  </ul>

<div class="image-box3" style="width: 80%; box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0 auto;">
<p>Reject $H_0$ for both $(p\text{-value} < 0.000001)$</p>
</div>

</div>

<div class="col">
  <p>Non-parametric</p>
  <li style="text-align: left;">Not happy with the Gamma assumption?</li>
  <li style="text-align: left;">Try the Kolmogorov-Smirnov test:</li>
  <li style="text-align: left;">$H_0$: Wet and dry spacings come from the same distribution</li>
  <li style="text-align: left;">$H_A$: Wet and dry spacings come from different distributions</li>
</div>
</div>
</section>

<section data-auto-animate>
<div class="container">

<div class="col">
  <p>Test Results</p>

<div class="image-box3" style="width: 90%; box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0 auto;">
<p>Reject $H_0$ for both $(p\text{-value} < 0.000001)$</p>


<p style="text-align: left;">$\rightarrow$ Mean duration between crashes differs under dry and wet conditions</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">$\rightarrow$ Distributions of durations differ under dry and wet conditions</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col">
  <p>Extent of Difference</p>
<ul>
  <li style="text-align: left;">Dry vs. Any Rain</li>
  <ul> 
    <li>20.6 vs 16.5 min (+24.85%)</li>
  </ul>
  <li style="text-align: left;">Dry vs. Moderate-to-Heavy Rain</li>
  <ul> 
    <li>20.4 vs 12.3 min (+65.85%)</li>
  </ul>
  <li style="text-align: left;">Dry vs. Heavy Rain</li>
  <ul> 
    <li>20.3 vs 13.0 min (+56.15%)</li>
  </ul>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
</section>


<!-- ------------------------------------------------------>

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h1 style="text-align: center;">Precipitation &</h1>
  <h1 style="text-align: center;">Accident Severity</h1>
</section>

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h2 style="text-align: center;">Precipitation & Accident Severity</h2>
  
<div class="image-box3" style="width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box;">
<img src="../scripts/outputs/figures/fig1_injury_by_precip.png" style="display: block; margin: 0 auto; width: 100%;">
</div>
<p style="text-align: center;">Injury Result Crashes in CT, 1/1/2015-12/31/2023</p>
</section>

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h2>Contingency Table Methods</h2>

  <p class="table-title">Injury Occurrences per precipitation category</p>
 
<div class="severity-legend">
  <div class="legend-item"><div class="dot" style="background:#E24B4A;"></div> K — Fatal</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><div class="dot" style="background:#EF9F27;"></div> A — Suspected serious</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><div class="dot" style="background:#639922;"></div> B — Suspected minor</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><div class="dot" style="background:#378ADD;"></div> C — Possible injury</div>
</div>
<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th class="label-col">Precipitation</th>
      <th><span class="badge badge-k">K</span></th>
      <th><span class="badge badge-a">A</span></th>
      <th><span class="badge badge-b">B</span></th>
      <th><span class="badge badge-c">C</span></th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td class="label-col">Dry</td>
      <td>2,572</td>
      <td>12,164</td>
      <td>102,404</td>
      <td>123,538</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="label-col">Light rain</td>
      <td>316</td>
      <td>1,350</td>
      <td>14,025</td>
      <td>18,549</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="label-col">Moderate rain</td>
      <td>32</td>
      <td>97</td>
      <td>1,216</td>
      <td>1,537</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="label-col">Heavy rain</td>
      <td>1</td>
      <td>4</td>
      <td>53</td>
      <td>61</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

<p>Traditional contingency table tests find significant differences in the distribution of injury severities across precipitation categories.</p>

<p>However, the effect size is very small. </p>
 
</section>




<!--SLIDE 6 ------------------------------------------------------>

<!--SLIDE 12 ------------------------------------------------------>

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h2 style="text-align: center;">Conclusions</h2>
  
  <p>Under rainy conditions, the duration between crashes is significantly shorter than under dry conditions.</p>
  <p>The severity of injuries in injury-result crashes is not significantly different under rainy and dry conditions.</p>
</section>

<!--SLIDE 13 ------------------------------------------------------>

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h2 style="text-align: center;">Conclusions, cont. </h2>
  
</section>

<!--SLIDE 14 ------------------------------------------------------>

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h1 style="text-align: center;">Thank you! Questions?</h1>
  
</section>

<!--SLIDE 15 ------------------------------------------------------>

<section data-auto-animate>
  <h2 style="text-align: center;"> References </h2>
  
</section>
